user.title: Proxon FWT Modbus – Connection type
user.description:
Select how your Proxon is connected.

• **TCP** – real Modbus-TCP gateway (protocol converter)
• **RTU-over-TCP** – serial server in transparent mode (e.g. Waveshare/USR, tunnels RTU frames over TCP)
• **Serial** – RS485 directly via USB adapter (e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0)

tcp.title: Modbus TCP Connection
tcp.description: IP address and port of your real Modbus TCP gateway.

rtuovertcp.title: Modbus RTU-over-TCP
rtuovertcp.description: IP address and port of your RS485-to-Ethernet serial server (e.g. Waveshare/USR in transparent mode). RTU frames are tunneled unchanged over TCP.

serial.title: Modbus Serial (RTU)
serial.description: Connection parameters of your RS485 adapter. Proxon default: 19200 8E1 (RTU).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Proxon FWT
reconfigure.description: Choose the connection type. On the next step you can update all connection details.

reconfigure_tcp.title: Reconfigure TCP
reconfigure_tcp.description: Update TCP connection data. The integration will be reloaded after saving.

reconfigure_rtuovertcp.title: Reconfigure RTU-over-TCP
reconfigure_rtuovertcp.description: Update serial server connection data. The integration will be reloaded after saving.

reconfigure_serial.title: Reconfigure Serial
reconfigure_serial.description: Update the serial connection data. The integration will be reloaded after saving.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Modbus gateway
